### P1 Stale

1. **`docs/architecture/system-overview.md`** — Freshness Tooling container lists 4 subcommands, actual has 7
   - Doc says: `Container(doctools, "Freshness Tooling", "scripts/doc-tools.sh", "Bundled shell scripts: build-index, check-freshness, update-index, status")`
   - Code shows: doc-tools.sh has 7 subcommands: `build-index`, `check-freshness`, `update-index`, `add-entry`, `remove-entry`, `deprecate-entry`, `status`
   - Suggested fix: Update container description to list all 7 subcommands

2. **`docs/codebase-guide.md`** — Directory tree and Key Files table say "4 subcommands"
   - Doc says: `"Bundled freshness tooling with 4 subcommands: build-index, check-freshness, update-index, status"`
   - Code shows: 7 subcommands (same as above)
   - Suggested fix: Update subcommand count and list in both locations

3. **`docs/codebase-guide.md`** — Release action line number reference shifted
   - Doc says: `"Release action routing | SKILL.md Section 1 release subsection (lines 409-427)"`
   - Code shows: Release subsection is at SKILL.md lines 412-430
   - Suggested fix: Replace hardcoded line numbers with section name references

4. **`docs/workflows/doc-superpowers.md`** — Init Mermaid diagram ordering contradicts text and SKILL.md
   - Doc says: Init Phase 3 diagram shows Generate docs → Diagrams → build-index → CLAUDE.md → README.md
   - Code shows: SKILL.md init steps are Generate docs → CLAUDE.md (step 8) → README.md (step 9) → Diagrams (step 10) → Freshness markers (step 11) → build-index (step 12)
   - Suggested fix: Reorder Mermaid diagram nodes to match SKILL.md step sequence

5. **`docs/conventions.md`** — `In Review` status "Set By" is wrong
   - Doc says: `"In Review | Set By: spec-inject --phase=plan"`
   - Code shows: `spec-inject --phase=plan` only injects a plan task; actual status transition happens during execute phase (`spec-inject --phase=execute`)
   - Suggested fix: Change Set By to `spec-inject --phase=execute`
